import { AsyncAction } from './AsyncAction'; import { Subscription } from '../Subscription'; import { QueueScheduler } from './QueueScheduler'; import { SchedulerAction } from '../types'; import { TimerHandle } from './timerHandle'; export declare class QueueAction<T> extends AsyncAction<T> { protected scheduler: QueueScheduler; protected work: (this: SchedulerAction<T>, state?: T) => void; constructor(scheduler: QueueScheduler, work: (this: SchedulerAction<T>, state?: T) => void); schedule(state?: T, delay?: number): Subscription; execute(state: T, delay: number): any; protected requestAsyncId(scheduler: QueueScheduler, id?: TimerHandle, delay?: number): TimerHandle; } //# sourceMappingURL=QueueAction.d.ts.map
